description: This video provides a comprehensive guide on how to long on margin trading using Binance. It explains the process of buying BTC at a low price and selling at a higher price to earn profits, with a focus on using isolated margin for higher leverage. The video also covers risk management strategies using OCO orders.
topic_summary: Learn how to long on margin trading with Binance, including the use of isolated margin for higher profits and risk management techniques with OCO orders. Key example includes trading BTC at $10,000 and managing risks if prices fluctuate [t=94:04].
aliases: How to Long on Margin Trading
